text: Welcome to biology.

that perspective will change how you understand biology.

In contrast,
Most biology courses have what's called

that the only thing that exists in the world is,

Another contrast,
In addition to the issue of talking about God,

another contrast between this course

Holism.

What do these things mean?
Holism is the idea that in order to understand the big stuff,
you have to understand something.
You have to understand the whole.
You have to understand some large perspective.
And specifically, we need to start with God.
In order to understand those things that are made,
those small things that we encounter every day,
We've got to understand the One who created those things.
The One who holds those things together.
The One who gave those things purpose.
We have to start with God,
our big picture,
in order to understand the little things.
That's a holistic perspective

in order to understand something small.

We consider God's perspective in this kind of a course.
In contrast, in a naturalistic worldview,
they don't believe in a God.

In fact, in a naturalistic worldview,

Characteristics emerge
